name: Bedtime BG 11.0 and rising
description: BG at 11.0 and still climbing when the bedtime window opens (past the meal window). Mirrors 2026-04-10 21:40 observation where BG was 11.1 slowly rising after a dinner rescue. The engine must NOT add more carbs on top of a rising above-target BG — overnight insulin should be left to do its job. Tests concern #3 fix: above-target rising bedtime → no-snack branch. Evening injection 19:00 local, meal window expires at 21:30 local (150 min).
